provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Pensions (Determination of Certain Offices as Public Service) Order.

provisions.title: Service in certain offices deemed to be public service
provisions.content:
2. Service in certain offices deemed to be public service
Service in the Unified Local Government Service including the Unified Teaching Service, in any of the offices set out in the Schedule hereto shall, for the purposes of the Pensions Act, be deemed to be public Service.
